# 3DTILES\_viewer\_request\_volume

## Contributors

## Status

Draft

## Dependencies

Written against the glTF 2.1 spec.

## Optional vs. Required

This extension is required, meaning it **MUST** be placed in both `extensionsRequired` and `extensionsUsed`.
